/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/openmusic.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/openmusic.dir/openmusic_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openmusic.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openmusic.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o -o openmusic  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
